title: HookedSpear
description: Resource pack that turns a trident into a spear with a hook
body:
![Tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d005160c950102c0dd7fed78aea690e32c0c232.png)
# Introducing
Hello everyone, and thanks for looking and downloading my first pack! I am just a beginner, but I like to create like others. Khm Khm... **So this resource pack changes the model and item texture of the trident.** In the future, I would remodel and retexture it to look similar to vanilla as much as possible. Thanks for reading.
# Required:
ETF and EMF, and also OptiFine.
# FAQ
YouTube - www.youtube.com/@KeyGlobe
